description: Interactive weekly question-based campaigns with prize incentives (cash rewards via app) to drive user participation and app engagement.
structural_recipe: Post a thought-provoking weekly question related to brand values or customer experience. Structure: (1) Poetic/engaging question opener in Arabic, (2) Hashtag series with campaign theme, (3) Clear call-to-action requesting user response, (4) Prize announcement (cash via app/wallet), (5) App download/follow reminder with emoji, (6) Closing emoji for warmth. Use colloquial Arabic with romantic/emotional undertones.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond strongly to: interactive participation (breaks passive consumption), financial incentives (cash prizes create tangible value), emotional/romantic framing (builds brand affinity), and app ecosystem integration (drives app retention and user data). Weekly cadence creates habit-forming engagement loops.
transplantation_caveats: Prize regulations: Ensure compliance with Saudi gambling and contest laws; cash prizes may require specific disclaimers
App dependency: Requires functional mobile app; not all brands have infrastructure for wallet/cash distribution
Arabic language sensitivity: Romantic framing may not suit all sectors; test cultural appropriateness per industry
Question relevance: Weekly question must align with brand identity; generic questions reduce engagement
cultural_constraints: Ensure questions align with Islamic values
Romantic/emotional tone acceptable in F&B/lifestyle but may require adjustment for corporate/B2B sectors
